titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/217

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=160 status=live modified=2017-02-17 01:41:32.898959+00 | translation moa=161 status=live modified=2017-02-17 01:41:29.078484+00

div.p:
Dauid rex Scottorum . Omnibus probis hominibus suis de Edenesburc Sira .
salutem . prohibeo ne aliquis super terram aliquid accipiat quam dedi in elemosina
ecclesie sancte Crucis de edenesburc  nisi per licentiam ⁊ concessum canonicorum
ibidem deo ⁊ sancte Cruci seruientium . scilicet nec in herba . nec in cespiti
bus . siue aliis rebus nisi per concessum canonicorum predictorum . Teste Iohanne episcopo .
Apud Edenesburc .

David king of Scots to all his worthy men in the shire of Edinburgh, Greeting: I forbid that anyone should take anything from the land that I have given in alms to the church of Holyrood in Edinburgh, unless by licence and consent of the canons serving God and Holyrood there, that is, neither in grass nor in peats or other things, unless by the consent of the aforesaid canons. As witness, John the bishop. At Edinburgh.
